cloud9.environmentec2.AutomaticStopTimeM.Description: The number of minutes until the running instance is shut down after the environment was last used.

cloud9.environmentec2.ConnectionType.Description: The connection type used for connecting to an Amazon EC2 environment. Valid values are `CONNECT_SSH` (default) and `CONNECT_SSM` (connected through AWS Systems Manager).

cloud9.environmentec2.Description.Description: The description of the environment to create.

cloud9.environmentec2.ImageId.Description: The identifier for the Amazon Machine Image (AMI) that's used to create the EC2 instance. To choose an AMI for the instance, you must specify a valid AMI alias or a valid AWS Systems Manager path.  The default AMI is used if the parameter isn't explicitly assigned a value in the request.

cloud9.environmentec2.InstanceType.Description: The type of instance to connect to the environment (for example, `t2.micro`).

cloud9.environmentec2.OwnerArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the environment owner. This ARN can be the ARN of any AWS Identity and Access Management principal. If this value is not specified, the ARN defaults to this environment's creator.

cloud9.environmentec2.Repositories.Description: Any AWS CodeCommit source code repositories to be cloned into the development environment.

cloud9.environmentec2.SubnetId.Description: The ID of the subnet in Amazon Virtual Private Cloud (Amazon VPC) that AWS Cloud9 will use to communicate with the Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) instance.

cloud9.environmentec2.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs that will be associated with the new AWS Cloud9 development environment.
